questions: How do I start an ecommerce business?
What platforms can I use for ecommerce?
answers: E-commerce is buying and selling goods or services over the internet. It includes online shops, marketplaces, digital products, and subscription services.
E-commerce holo internet er maddhhomey product ba service kena-becha. Online shop, marketplace, digital product — sob e-commerce er odhine porey.
To start an ecommerce business, pick a niche, source or create products, set up an online store using platforms like Shopify or WooCommerce, and market through social media and SEO.
Popular ecommerce platforms include Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix, BigCommerce, and marketplaces like Amazon, Daraz, and Etsy. Choose based on your budget and technical skills.
